title: Mining Quarries
description: Build quarries that mine cobblestone and ores!
body:
# Mining Quarries Mod

## Overview
- **Adds a new block** called the **Quarry**.
- **Crafting Recipe**:
  - 3 × Cobblestone
  - 1 × Water Bucket
  - 1 x Redstone
  - 1 × Lava Bucket
  - 2 × Cauldrons
  - 1 × Hopper

![Awaiting image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/548f3ef246d1614ef0d17e79a39c10486aec8ab0.png)

## Quarry Block Mechanics
- **Directional block** with a **9×9 inventory**.
- **Supports multiple container outputs** by facing multiple Quarries into the same container.
- **Loot generation** occurs only when:
  1. The chunk is loaded.
  2. The Quarry is facing into a valid container (e.g., Chest, Barrel).
  3. The pickaxe has more than **1 durability** left.

## Usage Steps
1. **Place the Quarry** in the desired orientation, making sure it faces a container.
2. **Insert a pickaxe** in the **center slot** of the Quarry’s 9×9 inventory.
3. **(Optional) Place desired items** in any other slot(s) to **whitelist** them.  
   - Or place a **Redstone Torch** below the pickaxe to **blacklist** those items instead.
5. **Monitor pickaxe durability**; replace or repair it before it drops to 1 to keep the Quarry running.

## Pickaxe Behavior & Drops
- **Pickaxes never fully break**; it stops the Quarry when the pickaxe reaches 1 durability.
- **Base drops**; Cobblestone, Granite, Andesite, Diorite
- **Different pickaxes** affect:
  - **Cooldown** (delay between loot generation).
  - **Additional loot** types (beyond the base drops).
- **Cooldown and Drops Table**:

| Pickaxe   | Cooldown (s) | Additional Drops                        |
|-----------|--------------|-----------------------------------------|
| Gold      | 1.0          | *(None beyond base drops)*              |
| Wood      | 7.0          | + Coal                                  |
| Stone     | 6.0          | + Lapis                                 |
| Copper    | 5.0          | + Copper                                |
| Iron      | 4.0          | + Iron, + Redstone                      |
| Diamond   | 3.0          | + Diamond, + Emerald                    |
| Netherite | 2.0          | + Rare chance of Ancient Debris         |

## Pickaxe Enchantments
- **Efficiency**: Each level reduces the Quarry’s cooldown by 0.1s.
- **Unbreaking**: Functions like vanilla Unbreaking, slowing durability loss.
- **Fortune**: Each level adds **1 extra loot roll** per Quarry cycle.
- **Silk Touch**: Drops become their silk-touch variants (e.g., Stone instead of Cobblestone).
- **Mending**: No durability loss (effectively infinite uses).

## Filtering System
- In the **9×9 Quarry inventory**, **all slots except the center** are **filtering slots**.
- **Whitelist Mode (default)**: Only items matching what’s in those filter slots will drop.
- **Blacklist Mode**: Placing a **Redstone Torch** in the **slot below** the center pickaxe slot switches all filtering slots into a **blacklist**.
- **Important**: If you are using **Silk Touch**, use silk-touched variants in the filter slots to match those exact drops.

![Awaiting gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/d8e6746b3fe2aaac6689ff9706299880431ccf75.gif)

<details>
<summary>For versions prior to 2.0.0</summary>
Build quarries that mine for you. All you need is a pickaxe, cauldrons of water and lava, an item frame, and a hopper.
  
  The ores you get and the speed at which the quarry operates is completely variable to the pickaxe you give it. Ores of increased tiers are rarer to be obtained through the quarry. Ancient debris for example is 1 in 1125 chance. 
  
  These quarries aren't overpowered. It's mostly cobblestone.
  
- Golden Pickaxe: 1s delay; **cobblestone** only.
- Wooden Pickaxe: 6s delay; Golden tier + **coal**
- Stone Pickaxe: 5s delay; Wooden tier + **copper**, and **lapis**
- Iron Pickaxe: 4s delay; Stone tier + **iron**, and **redstone**
- Diamond Pickaxe: 3s delay; Iron tier + **gold**, **diamonds**, and **emeralds**
- Netherite Pickaxe: 2s delay; Diamond tier + **ancient debris**

As the quarry operates, the pickaxe will lose durability. Once the pickaxe is all used up, it gets sent in with the ores with one durability left. This way your pickaxes aren't destroyed. If you want to extend the lifetime of the pickaxe, you can enchant it with unbreaking, which operates exactly as if you were to mine something. It checks for unbreaking only up to 10 levels.

Other applicable enchants include fortune, mending, and silk touch. Mending pickaxes don't lose durability! And silk touch pickaxes mine the silk touch variant of ores and stones. Fortune works by producing an extra tick of resources per level. Up to 3.

How do you build one? Check out this GIF.

![Building the quarry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/2e669a2280dadc003b3279a2de201d2abfd0d45d.gif)

You can increase production by adding more lava cauldrons. Up to 3 extras.

![Upgrading the quarry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/f8aa81aec35a619751f7b341b6b1bbcbb384c74d.gif)

Don't want all the cobblestone? Want to only mine for diamonds for example? As of version 1.1.0, you can now filter up to 4 items to mine for. The quarry will still take damage and generate loot, but the loot you don't want will be destroyed, leaving only the resources you've selected.

How do you set up filtering? Place an item frame on the lava cauldrons. Four cauldrons, four items to filter. See this:
![Item Filtering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/70183b4a48b63a6d82d2fda542ec1c53768f4541.png)

Quarries may share the same lava cauldron, like sugar cane can share water. And by extension, filtering rules.

![Shared cauldrons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oE9ENsy7/images/51f5badc6caf55d73c92526b0df97a52ab40c84b.png)


</details>

Looking to automate tree farming? Check out [Potted Farms](https://modrinth.com/datapack/potted-farms)

And [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)

_Logo gifted by Mechanary_
